summary: Closed SpecBridge phase 1 foundation status, completed the repository-first MVP operating runbook, and defined the essential V3 product scope while leaving runtime implementation and version 4 work explicitly future-scoped.
policy_result: Passed. Changes are documentation and governance artifacts only. No secrets, production configuration, deployment automation, runtime product code, MCP server implementation, autonomous merge, or autonomous push to main were included.
risk_result: Low risk. Documentation and governance scope only. All required local validations passed.
unresolved_risks: CI evidence requires push and pull request creation.
V3 runtime implementation remains blocked until a dedicated execution contract authorizes source paths, runtime choice, tests, lint, typecheck, and build gates.
